title: sphenodesme ferruginea
intro: Sphenodesme ferruginea, also known as the Red-stemmed Sphenodesme, is a plant species native to New Caledonia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Sphenodesme ferruginea is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats, thanks to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, allowing for its medicinal benefits to be harnessed in various forms.
